doctor;
In a female chart if Jupiter, Saturn are combined in 2nd, 5th
to Venus the native will have a job equivalent to doctor. In some
charts ifthere is a combination of Jupiter + Saturn + Ketu the
native will have a job equivalent to doctor. If there is a combination
of Venus+ Jupiter+ Ketu the native will have job of respectable
teacher.
Foreign country visit by Wife
If Venus has Rahu or Ketu in the znd and Moon is posited
in znd to this Rahu or ketu, then she has a chance to go to a
foreign country. If Venus has Saturn, Moon in the 2nd house, the
native will travel to a foreign country on an assignment.
Wife is of Short Tempered character
If Venus has the Combination of Mars+ Jupiter or if Venus
has Mars & Jupiter in the 51 \ 9'h she will be of short tempered
character.

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 47
Wife is ofExcessive short tempered:
